prompt: Fammi un audit veloce del repo: cosa è solido, cosa è fragile, cosa toglierei se dovessi lanciare domani?
content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: audit_repo_pre_launch_hewn
C: tests_157_pass_in_0_38s ∧ core_src_3_4k_loc_split_clean ∧ drift_fix_hook_plus_38_tests ∧ bench_numbers_documented_in_readme ∧ opt_in_surface_default_claude_untouched
P: brand_rename_flint_to_hewn_incomplete ∧ install_url_still_tommy29tmar_slash_flint ∧ wire_header_still_flint_v0_hybrid ∧ bin_wrappers_duplicated_flint_and_hewn ∧ output_styles_duplicated_flint_md_and_hewn_md ∧ skills_dir_still_named_flint ∧ forty_plus_files_dirty_on_main ∧ evals_runs_vibe_3way_deleted_without_replacement ∧ two_clis_conflated_bash_wrapper_vs_python_flint_ir ∧ cccaveman_bench_only_wrapper_shipped_in_bin
V: "git status clean before tag" ∧ "grep -r tommy29tmar/flint returns 0 in README and install.sh" ∧ "ls integrations/claude-code/bin has one real file per lane rest symlinks" ∧ "ls integrations/claude-code/output-styles has no duplicated content" ∧ "ls integrations/claude-code/skills shows hewn entries with flint aliases" ∧ "pytest still 157 green" ∧ "README disambiguates hewn wrapper vs hewn-ir python upfront"
A: commit_or_revert_dirty_tree ∧ collapse_flint_bins_to_symlinks_of_hewn ∧ collapse_flint_output_styles_to_symlinks_of_hewn ∧ rename_skills_dir_flint_to_hewn_with_legacy_alias ∧ fix_install_url_to_final_repo_slug_before_launch ∧ drop_cccaveman_from_shipped_bin_move_to_scripts ∧ decide_wire_header_rename_now_or_document_freeze_explicitly ∧ regenerate_or_stop_tracking_evals_runs_vibe_3way ∧ add_one_line_to_readme_distinguishing_hewn_wrapper_from_hewn_ir_cli

input.command: git status -s | head -40 && echo "---" && diff /home/tommaso/dev/playground/SIGIL/integrations/claude-code/bin/flint /home/tommaso/dev/playground/SIGIL/integrations/claude-code/bin/hewn 2>&1 | head -20 && echo "---hewn-mcp-vs-flint-mcp---" && diff /home/tommaso/dev/playground/SIGIL/integrations/claude-code/bin/flint-mcp /home/tommaso/dev/playground/SIGIL/integrations/claude-code/bin/hewn-mcp 2>&1 | head -20
